response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate lacks recent Java-specific project work, has only basic German language proficiency (a hard requirement), and their recent roles are senior/lead positions inconsistent with an entry-level role, raising concerns about fit, salary expectations, and alignment with junior responsibilities.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in diverse projects
Demonstrated expertise in agile practices, testing, and CI/CD pipelines
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, failing to meet required fluency
No recent Java-focused work despite Java being a core requirement
Overqualified with senior roles, raising risk of misalignment with junior position scope
